name: Starry Bridge Physics Puzzle
description: Starry Bridge: Physics Puzzle is a captivating and brain-challenging game that tests your problem-solving skills like never before. Navigate through a series of levels filled with gravity-defying obstacles, interactive objects, and clever physics-based challenges. Use your creativity and understanding of physics to build bridges, trigger chain reactions, and find innovative solutions to reach your goals. With intuitive controls and engaging gameplay, Starry Bridge: Physics Puzzle promises hours of fun and mental stimulation for players of all ages. Get ready to construct, experiment, and master the laws of physics to conquer every level!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
